creator: Udo.Schweigert@siemens.com
text:
Hi Martin, 

please use the attached patch, it also brings the SIDEBAR_PATCH to the most
recent version. Please also try to test it in your environment, as we had
some trouble with it in the past.

Regards.

Udo


 On Mon, Jun 01, 2009 at 08:08:35 +0000, miwi@freebsd.org wrote:
> Synopsis: [PATCH] mail/mutt-devel: Remove unused configure args, pet portlint
